concerns: Step 2 signature ambiguity: plan says 'add optional mode parameter' but doesn't specify how it integrates with the existing 3-positional-param signature (paletteHue, paletteSaturation, seed). Since paletteHue/paletteSaturation are unused in vibrant mode, clarify whether mode is a 4th positional arg or an options object.

Step 4 fog tweak (reducing vFogFactor multiplier from 0.6 to 0.4) affects ALL terrain rendering, not just vibrant palette. This should be clearly marked as conditional on visual testing and not a default action.

Plan only analyzes high-tier bloom (threshold=0.4, strength=1.2). Medium tier (threshold=0.6, strength=0.8) should also be considered since orange stop linear values are high enough to potentially trigger bloom at both tiers.
